title: viola × neilreichii
intro: Viola × neilreichii, also known as the hybrid pimpernel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it beneficial for wound healing and skin conditions. The health benefits of Viola × neilreichii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
